titleStmt.title: SII 23.365: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 365. (A.R. No. 365 of 1907.) Āḍuturai, Papanasam Taluk, Tanjavur District Āpatsahāyēśvara temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa [I?]: year [2]9: 1098-9 A.D.

summary.p: This registers the sale by the temple of a dry land (stated as executed by god Chaṇḍēśvara himself as agent) to a certain Umaimaṇiyaṉ, a kaikkōḷa of Ambaṇavēḷam, who was to maintain a perpetual lamp in the temple with the yield thereon and also to pay antarāyam in paddy to the temple. Tiraimūr-nāḍu is here said to be a division of Bhūpālakulavalli-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cakravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 29 Āvatu pūpālakulavallivaḷanāṭṭut tiraimurnāṭṭut tirukkuraṅkāṭu tuṟai Uṭaiyār [ mūlagṛhattu] caṇḍe[ śvara] neṉ Ampaṇaveḷattu kaikkoḷan Umaimaṇi
yanukku viṟṟukkuṭutta kollainilamāvatu Ittevaṟku tirunun=tā viḷakkukku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam kiḻpāṟkellai tirucciṟṟampala vāykkālukku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai tañcāvūṟ peruvaḻikku vaṭa
kkum melpāṟkellai Ittevar tevatānattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai cuṅkan=tavirttānukkut teṟkum Inta Ellaikkuṭpaṭṭa māvum Ivaṉukku viṟṟu paṇṭārattukku koṇṭa kācuka Inilattu
kku muṉpu An=tarāyattukku Aṭaippaṭi Aḷantuvarukiṟa I6 10 1yum paṇṭā rattukku Aḷantu Inilam kārmaṟu viḷaittu In=ta bhogaṅ koṇṭu It tirunun=tāviḷakku [ 1- m] candrādittavaṟ Erikkakkaṭavatāka kalmel veṭṭina Itu patmāheśvararakṣaiḥ ..
Digital edition of SII 23.365 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
